notes.honesty: Full-input values are real-shaped, not invented: pfc_confidence sweeps PFC's own per-step confidences, ne_level is the faithful {0,1} bool surface (NE has no continuous value), rpe counts are plausible recent-window tallies. A change is the real pfc/lc/rpe terms acting through the score weights (0.3/0.1/0.05).
notes.bg_applied: BG.applied stays False (type hard-lock). B10 fills inputs only; the recommendation is still never consumed. C2 decides apply.
